content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Business     Loans and finance     Business loans   Business loans   Manage your cash flow, purchase stock or inventory and grow your business with our wide range of loans for small businesses.    Business loans to suit your needs   We have business lending solutions for different stages and types of businesses.    NAB QuickBiz Loan   No physical assets required for security and fast access to funds.    Borrow from:    $5,000 - $250,000    Apply now   Find out more   NAB Business Options Loan   An easy to understand medium to long-term business loan, ideal for growing your business.    Borrow from:    $20,000    Apply now   Find out more   Vehicle and Equipment Loan   Own your next vehicle or equipment straight away with no upfront deposit or monthly fees.    Borrow from:    $20,000    Enquire now   Find out more   Our specialist business loans   As a specialised business, you need finance options that are tailored for your industry and unique business needs.    NAB Flex-Flow Loan   A fast, flexible loan designed for NAB Merchants to match your cash flow and keep your business running smoothly.    NAB Business Markets Loan   Manage borrowing costs and protect your business against interest rate changes.    Bank guarantee   Guarantee payments to your landlord or business partners and hold onto your cash until the contract is complete.    Help me choose the right business loan    Start by answering a few simple questions with our helpful product selector tool.    Get started   Most popular   Fast unsecured business loan   Choose a fast, simple and flexible unsecured business loan with a competitive interest rate. Apply online for fast access up to $250,000.    Fast online application   Find out more   Case study Empowering customers, every step of the way   "We want to be successful, and we know our local banker Annie is behind us. There's a great community approach where Annie works closely with our accountant, to achieve the same goals. It's so handy having a banker in our town who can connect with local people and attend our meetings."    Angela Freeman, owner of TJM Toowoomba    Australia’s largest business lender   We have a team of bankers, specialists and support staff assisting businesses across Australia.    Request a call back   Tailored lending that works for you   We can help you find the right loan and borrowing structure to suits your business needs.     Book an appointment   Support for regional business   We have 650 regional and agribusiness bankers in more than 120 locations around Australia.    Explore Agribusiness options   Getting started Common business loan questions   What is a business loan?    A business loan is an arrangement where a business is provided funding, usually by a financial institution. In exchange for the funding, the business agrees to repay the borrowed money over the loan term, together with interest rates and fees. Business loans can be secured or unsecured, have variable or fixed interest, have different term lengths and may offer repayment terms which can be tailored to your circumstances.    We offer a variety of business loans to help make it easier to find a loan that works for you.    How fast is the approval process?    This depends on the type of business loan you are applying for. If you need a business loan quickly, the NAB QuickBiz unsecured business loan could be an ideal solution, with the ability to borrow small amounts between $5,000 and $250,000. The application process takes 15-20 minutes and once approved, you may be able to access funds within one business day.        What to know before applying      Difference between secured and unsecured loans      Choosing the right business loan   Is it difficult to get a business loan?    Obtaining a business loan depends on your business’s financial health, credit history and the type of loan you’re applying for. If you already have a solid business plan, financial documentation and good credit, the process will be easy. NAB offers flexible loan options for businesses at all stages, including loans for small businesses, with a simplified application process.    Help and support Help with your business banking   Find guides, FAQs and helpful information for managing your business banking.    View help and support centre       Starting out      Growing your business      Managing your business      Securing your future   Other products to consider       NAB QuickBiz unsecured business overdraft  Manage your cash flow and unexpected expenses with an unsecured business overdraft on your transaction account, up to $50,000.      NAB Green Finance for Vehicles and Equipment  Learn about our green equipment financing options for businesses, including a fixed rate for electric vehicles.       NAB Qantas Business Signature Card  Maximise your Qantas Points and get more from your business credit card purchases.       NAB Rewards Business Signature Card  Earn NAB Reward Points and redeem them at the NAB Rewards Store for a range of products and experiences.       NAB Business Everyday Account ($0 monthly fee)  Only pay for what you need, with this transaction account with no monthly account fee.       NAB Business Everyday Account ($10 Monthly Fee)  For businesses making a large number of cash and cheque transactions.       NAB Easy Tap  Learn how the NAB Easy Tap app can turn your Android device into an EFTPOS reader.        1   Step 1    Step 1       2   Step 2    Step 2       3   Step 3    Step 3       Complete    Step 4    Previous   1 of 7   Next   Help and support Help with your business banking   Find guides, FAQs and helpful information for managing your business banking. Find a NAB business banking centre   Important Information   Terms and conditions    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.    Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.   NAB QuickBiz Loan    This loan is available only as a fixed interest rate principal and interest loan for a 12, 24, 36, 48 or 60-month term with monthly repayments. The NAB QuickBiz Loan interest rate applies from the drawdown date of your NAB QuickBiz Loan until the end of your loan term. Variable rate loan and interest only loans are not available. Economic costs may be payable if you terminate early. If this does not work for you, we have other loan options that may better suit your needs.    You must have an Australian bank account, in the same name as your business, to receive your funds.     The NAB QuickBiz Loan has no upfront or ongoing fees but economic costs may apply if you choose to pay the loan off before the end date of the contract.    These products are issued by National Australia Bank Limited ABN 12 004 044 937.    Lending criteria and terms and conditions apply (available on application).
